description: 55M, HTN, LDL 165, ASCVD risk 8.5%. ACC/AHA R4 (COR I, LOE A) provides definitive statin guidance; USPSTF Grade C is preempted (P4, ADR 0018). ACC/AHA rec drives the statin action.

actions.label: Initiate moderate-to-high-intensity statin therapy
actions.rationale: ACC/AHA COR I, LOE A: adults 40-75 without diabetes, LDL 70-189 mg/dL, and 10-year ASCVD risk ≥7.5% should initiate moderate-to-high-intensity statin. USPSTF Grade C also matched but is preempted by the more specific ACC/AHA guidance (ADR 0018). Patient has LDL 165, ASCVD risk 8.5%.

actions.label: Optimize blood pressure management
actions.rationale: BP 142/88 mmHg is above target despite HTN diagnosis. No current antihypertensive on medication list. HTN is a modifiable CVD risk factor.
